Sploosh-o-matic.strengths: Highly mobile. Easily outmaneuvers most opponents to take fights on its terms.
Sploosh-o-matic.weaknesses: Short range and low accuracy. Struggles in fights on open ground.
Sploosh-o-matic.playstyle: Rat slayer. Gets splats from behind. Causes distractions.
Sploosh-o-matic.recommendation: Use Curling Bomb to maximize mobility and Ultra Stamp throw as long-range tool.

Neo Sploosh-o-matic.strengths: Highly mobile. Easily outmaneuvers most opponents to take fights on its terms.
Neo Sploosh-o-matic.weaknesses: Short range and low accuracy. Struggles in fights on open ground.
Neo Sploosh-o-matic.playstyle: Rat slayer. Gets splats from behind. Causes distractions.
Neo Sploosh-o-matic.recommendation: Use high mobility and Squid Beakons to inconvenience opponents. Killer Wail displaces longer range threats.

Splattershot Jr..strengths: Good paint output for turf control. High mobility helps it be in good positions.
Splattershot Jr..weaknesses: Short range and high shot variance makes it poor at 1v1 combat.
Splattershot Jr..playstyle: Supports teammates by painting and aiding better fighters.
Splattershot Jr..recommendation: Use Splat Bombs to get splats. Big Bubbler helps it hold down positions it can't hold with its own range.

Custom Splattershot Jr.strengths: Good paint output for turf control. High mobility helps it be in good positions.
Custom Splattershot Jr.weaknesses: Short range and high shot variance makes it poor at 1v1 combat.
Custom Splattershot Jr.playstyle: Supports team through paint and marking enemies with its kit tools.
Custom Splattershot Jr.recommendation: Hassle long-range threats with Torpedo, and use Wave Breaker to increase weapon uptime.

Splash-o-matic.strengths: Fantastic paint output for support. Perfect accuracy makes it a decent fighter as well.
Splash-o-matic.weaknesses: Short range and low damage bullets make it harder to challenge better fighters.
Splash-o-matic.playstyle: Paint support and skirmishing. Assists in skirmishes and team fights.
Splash-o-matic.recommendation: Stabilize holds and retakes with Crab Tank. Use Burst Bomb to aid teammates in fights.

Neo Splash-o-matic.strengths: Fantastic paint output for support. Perfect accuracy makes it a decent fighter as well.
Neo Splash-o-matic.weaknesses: Short range and low damage bullets make it harder to challenge better fighters.
Neo Splash-o-matic.playstyle: Paint support and producing Triple Inkstrikes. Can assist with 2v1 fights.
Neo Splash-o-matic.recommendation: Use paint, Suction Bombs, and Triple Inkstrike to help retain map control at key moments.

Splash-o-matic GCK-O.strengths: Fantastic paint output for support. Perfect accuracy makes it a decent fighter as well.
Splash-o-matic GCK-O.weaknesses: Short range and low damage, without a bomb to assist with lethality.
Splash-o-matic GCK-O.playstyle: Supportive, with tools to contain opponents in key areas so teammates can finish the job.
Splash-o-matic GCK-O.recommendation: Use Toxic Mist and Ink Storm to make it difficult for opponents to operate in key areas.

Aerospray MG.weaknesses: High shot spread, low damage, and short range makes splatting enemies with the main weapon unlikely.
Aerospray MG.playstyle: Provides lots of turf for teammates to operate in. Pokes with Fizzy and can get clutch plays with Reefslider.
Aerospray MG.recommendation: Focus on painting with the main instead of fighting. In a fight, a hit with Fizzy reduces a five-shot splat to a two or one.

Aerospray RG.weaknesses: High shot spread, low damage, and short range make it a poor fighter. No bomb compounds the problem.
Aerospray RG.playstyle: Entirely focused on painting. This results in many Booyah Bombs.
Aerospray RG.recommendation: Use Booyah Bombs at key moments to assist teammates, since the main weapon cannot contribute to team fights well.

Colorz Aerospray.weaknesses: High shot spread, low damage, and short range makes splatting enemies with the main weapon unlikely.
Colorz Aerospray.playstyle: Provides lots of turf to zone out opponents and help teammates with poor paint. Can assist in team fights with Burst Bomb.
Colorz Aerospray.recommendation: Use high turfing capabilities in combination with Splattercolor Screen to make it more difficult for opponents to operate.

Splattershot.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent fighter and decent painter.
Splattershot.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Specialists outclass it. Trizooka can be inconsistent.
Splattershot.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assists more deadly teammates that have less paint.
Splattershot.recommendation: Adapt to situations quickly. Support when needed and fight when needed. Use Trizooka to remove long range threats.

Tentatek Spattershot.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent fighter and decent painter.
Tentatek Spattershot.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Can be outfought by slaying specialists and out-supported by paint specialists.
Tentatek Spattershot.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assists more deadly teammates that have less paint.
Tentatek Spattershot.recommendation: Use flexibility to adapt to situations quickly. Triple Inkstrikes are key to retaking areas with this weapon.

Glamorz Splattershot.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent painter, and Burst Bomb improves its fighting capability.
Glamorz Splattershot.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Specialists outclass it.
Glamorz Splattershot.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assist in team fights with Burst Bomb. Can switch to paint support during downtime.
Glamorz Splattershot.recommendation: Make sure to strike first when engaging with similar ranged weapons. Use Kraken to secure key points.

Hero Shot Replica.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent fighter and decent painter.
Hero Shot Replica.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Specialists outclass it. Trizooka can be inconsistent.
Hero Shot Replica.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assists more deadly teammates that have less paint.
Hero Shot Replica.recommendation: Adapt to situations quickly. Support when needed and fight when needed. Use Trizooka to remove long range threats.

Octo Shot Replica.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent fighter and decent painter.
Octo Shot Replica.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Can be outfought by slaying specialists and out-supported by paint specialists.
Octo Shot Replica.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assists more deadly teammates that have less paint.
Octo Shot Replica.recommendation: Use flexibility to adapt to situations quickly. Triple Inkstrikes are key to retaking areas with this weapon.

Order Shot Replica.strengths: Very flexible and adaptable to situations. Decent fighter and decent painter.
Order Shot Replica.weaknesses: Averageness and short range. Specialists outclass it. Trizooka can be inconsistent.
Order Shot Replica.playstyle: Skirmishes with slaying weapons. Assists more deadly teammates that have less paint.
Order Shot Replica.recommendation: Adapt to situations quickly. Support when needed and fight when needed. Use Trizooka to remove long range threats.

.52 Gal.strengths: High-damage bullets with decent range and velocity make it a powerful two-shot killer.
.52 Gal.weaknesses: Lack of AOE or a bomb reduces its ability to poke or get revenge kills.
.52 Gal.playstyle: Uses range and deadliness to take up space and get kills before opponents can react.
.52 Gal.recommendation: Use Splash Wall to increase space and holding power. Use Killer Wail to move longer ranged targets.

.52 Gal Deco.strengths: High-damage bullets with decent range and velocity make it a powerful two-shot killer.
.52 Gal Deco.weaknesses: Out ranged by important midline weapons, and has no AOE to poke corners and ledges.
.52 Gal Deco.playstyle: Uses range and deadliness to take up space and get kills before opponents can react.
.52 Gal Deco.recommendation: Use Curling Bomb to move into position faster in combination with the blinding effect of Splattercolor Screen.

N-Zap '85.strengths: High fire rate and high strafe speed mean good paint output.
N-Zap '85.weaknesses: Low damage bullets and unimpressive range.
N-Zap '85.playstyle: Supports team with paint output and buffs from Tacticooler.
N-Zap '85.recommendation: Focus on surviving to produce more Tacticoolers. Aid better fighters in 2v1 engagements.

N-Zap '89.strengths: High fire rate and high strafe speed mean good paint output.
N-Zap '89.weaknesses: Low damage bullets and unimpressive range.
N-Zap '89.playstyle: Supports team with paint output. Super Chumps aid teammates with retake.
N-Zap '89.recommendation: Use Autobombs to poke and flush out stationary opponents. Move into space created by Chumps.

Splattershot Pro.strengths: Good range, damage, bullet velocity, and accuracy makes splatting opponents easier.
Splattershot Pro.weaknesses: Paint can be spotty, and unlike other weapons in this range and role, it has no AOE to hold ledges.
Splattershot Pro.playstyle: Primarily focused on getting splats. Crab Tank helps with holds and retakes when stabilization is needed.
Splattershot Pro.recommendation: Use Angle Shooter to splat retreating opponents. Crab Tank can pressure longer ranged threats.

Forge Splattershot Pro.strengths: Good range, damage, bullet velocity, and accuracy makes splatting opponents easier.
Forge Splattershot Pro.weaknesses: Paint can be spotty, and unlike other weapons in this range and role, it has no AOE to hold ledges.
Forge Splattershot Pro.playstyle: Primarily focused on getting splats. Suction Bomb can poke and get revenge kills when the weapon can't.
Forge Splattershot Pro.recommendation: Use Suction Bombs to flush out ledge-campers and deny space. Move into the space Booyah Bomb creates to keep moving forward.

Splattershot Pro FRZ-N.strengths: Good range, damage, bullet velocity, and accuracy makes splatting opponents easier.
Splattershot Pro FRZ-N.weaknesses: Paint can be spotty, and unlike other weapons in this range and role, it has no AOE to hold ledges.
Splattershot Pro FRZ-N.playstyle: Slays with primary weapon. Splat Bomb can pressure weapons out of range.
Splattershot Pro FRZ-N.recommendation: Use Tenta Missiles to disrupt opponent pushes while in range to finish the job with your teammates and your main weapon.

.96 Gal.strengths: Long range for a shooter and massive damage per shot make it a lethal two-shot killer.
.96 Gal.weaknesses: Very high shot RNG and a slow rate of fire means missing shots will be punished.
.96 Gal.playstyle: Midline support and anchor hybrid. Focuses on area denial and protecting teammates with Ink Vac.
.96 Gal.recommendation: Maintain paint support and charge specials quickly. Use Ink Vac to disrupt enemy shots, subs, and specials on both offense and defense.

.96 Gal Deco.strengths: Long range for a shooter and massive damage per shot make it a lethal two-shot killer.
.96 Gal Deco.weaknesses: Very high shot RNG and a slow rate of fire makes it easy to rush down when it misses shots.
.96 Gal Deco.playstyle: Aggressive midline skirmisher. Uses Splash Wall to win 1v1 duels and Kraken to lead frontline offenses.
.96 Gal Deco.recommendation: Use Splash Wall to mitigate shot RNG in standard gunfights. Use Kraken Royale to contest objectives and key chokepoints.

Clawz .96 Gal.strengths: High range and high-damage output combined with game-changing team buffs.
Clawz .96 Gal.weaknesses: High shot RNG and slow fire rates makes it worse in close-quarters combat.
Clawz .96 Gal.playstyle: Utility-oriented support skirmisher. Keeps the team active with buffs while capitalizing on long-range picks.
Clawz .96 Gal.recommendation: Use Angle Shooter to quickly mark and chip-damage targets. Focus on maximum Tacticooler uptime to keep your slayers aggressively pushing.

Jet Squelcher.strengths: Longest range shooter with reasonable accuracy for this range. Better mobility than Splatlings or Chargers.
Jet Squelcher.weaknesses: Middling fire rate at long range means nimble opponents can easily move away before they're splatted. Spotty paint output.
Jet Squelcher.playstyle: Provides chip support for team fights. Can lead objective pushes with Ink Vac.
Jet Squelcher.recommendation: Angle Shooter combines with two shots from the main weapon to finish off weakened opponents.

Custom Jet Squelcher.strengths: Longest range shooter with reasonable accuracy for this range. Better mobility than Splatlings or Chargers.
Custom Jet Squelcher.weaknesses: Middling fire rate at long range means nimble opponents can easily move away before they're splatted. Spotty paint output.
Custom Jet Squelcher.playstyle: Provides chip support for team fights. Offers additional suppression with Toxic Mist and Ink Storm.
Custom Jet Squelcher.recommendation: Toxic Mist can control opponent movement in constricted areas, making it easier to pick them off.

Jet Squelcher COB-R.strengths: Longest range shooter with reasonable accuracy for this range. Better mobility than Splatlings or Chargers.
Jet Squelcher COB-R.weaknesses: Middling fire rate at long range means nimble opponents can easily move away before they're splatted. Spotty paint output.
Jet Squelcher COB-R.playstyle: Offers suppressive fire on contested map areas. Can open opportunites with Triple Splashdown.
Jet Squelcher COB-R.recommendation: Provide chip support for team fights with both the main weapon and Burst Bomb. Splashdown by itself is ineffective - include team follow up.

Splattershot Nova.strengths: Consistent paint output at a safe distance and exceptional ink efficiency for utility spam.
Splattershot Nova.weaknesses: Abysmal kill time and wide shot spread make winning raw 1v1 fights highly unlikely.
Splattershot Nova.playstyle: Passive support painter and tracker. Focuses on turf control and tracing opponents rather than fighting.
Splattershot Nova.recommendation: Avoid direct confrontations. Spam Point Sensors to locate flankers for your slayers, and coordinate Killer Wail 5.1 with team pushes to disrupt backline anchors.

Annaki Splattershot Nova.strengths: High paint output to quickly farm special charge for Inkjet.
Annaki Splattershot Nova.weaknesses: Extremely weak primary weapon combat capability and lacks a throwable sub-weapon for safe neutral poking.
Annaki Splattershot Nova.playstyle: Special-centric midline support. Spends neutral turfing safely and relies almost entirely on special activations to exert pressure.
Annaki Splattershot Nova.recommendation: Place defensive Ink Mines on key flank paths to protect your territory. Prioritize special charge to access Inkjet, which is your only reliable tool for securing splats.

Luna Blaster.strengths: Fast moving Blaster with a large explosive radius. Can fire around obsticles and pop out of ink for a quick splat.
Luna Blaster.weaknesses: Struggles with ink management and mobility by itself; shots are ink hungry and Splat Bomb limits the number of shots it can fire afterwards.
Luna Blaster.playstyle: A close combat weapon with high lethality. Works best when it has paint support from teammates.
Luna Blaster.recommendation: Splat Bomb pokes areas it can't reach, and Zipcaster offers dramatic mobility and distraction power.

Luna Blaster Neo.strengths: Fast moving Blaster with a large explosive radius. Can fire around obsticles and pop out of ink for a quick splat.
Luna Blaster Neo.weaknesses: Can struggle with ink management. Struggles in open areas because it is outranged by most everything.
Luna Blaster Neo.playstyle: A close combat weapon with high lethality. Works best when it has paint support from teammates.
Luna Blaster Neo.recommendation: Fizzy Bomb is an important paint and mobility tool for a main weapon that lacks both. Throw Ultra Stamps at long-range threats.

Order Blaster Replica.strengths: Fast moving Blaster with a large explosive radius. Can fire around obsticles and pop out of ink for a quick splat.
Order Blaster Replica.weaknesses: Struggles with ink management and mobility by itself; shots are ink hungry and Splat Bomb limits the number of shots it can fire afterwards.
Order Blaster Replica.playstyle: A close combat weapon with high lethality. Works best when it has paint support from teammates.
Order Blaster Replica.recommendation: Splat Bomb pokes areas it can't reach, and Zipcaster offers dramatic mobility and distraction power.

Blaster.strengths: With good aim and positioning, Blaster can quickly eliminate any opponent, including those who are behind cover.
Blaster.weaknesses: Ink-hungry and poor at painting. Depends on teammates to support its slayer playstyle.
Blaster.playstyle: Holds ledges and drops with explosive radius, and one-shots opponents in 1v1s.
Blaster.recommendation: Autobomb is an escape and poke tool. Stay in range of your support teammates to reduce your need for precision aiming.

Custom Blaster.strengths: With good aim and positioning, Blaster can quickly eliminate any opponent, including those who are behind cover.
Custom Blaster.weaknesses: Ink-hungry and poor at painting. Depends on teammates to support its slayer playstyle.
Custom Blaster.playstyle: Holds ledges and drops with explosive radius, and one-shots opponents in 1v1s. Can cause havoc in teamfights with Splashdown
Custom Blaster.recommendation: Stay in range of your support teammates. Point Sensor can label opponents for easier aim, but beware ink management.

Gleamz Blaster.strengths: With good aim and positioning, Blaster can quickly eliminate any opponent, including those who are behind cover.
Gleamz Blaster.weaknesses: Squid Beakon is an expensive subweapon for an already ink-hungry main weapon.
Gleamz Blaster.playstyle: Uses Beakon to get back into the action on a weapon that is a little slower to roll out than other slayers.
Gleamz Blaster.recommendation: Crab Tank offers an anchoring tool to a slayer. Depend on your teammates for paint support.

Range Blaster.strengths: Longest range one-hit-kill Blaster. Can use AOE explosion to poke corners and ledges.
Range Blaster.weaknesses: Poor painting ability and paint efficiency makes it less mobile than other slayers.
Range Blaster.playstyle: Uses one shot and poking ability to take down opponents before they can engage.
Range Blaster.recommendation: Stay within range of your support teammates to maintain mobility.

Custom Range Blaster.strengths: Longest range one-hit-kill Blaster. Can use AOE explosion to poke corners and ledges.
Custom Range Blaster.weaknesses: Poor painting ability and paint efficiency makes it less mobile than other slayers.
Custom Range Blaster.playstyle: Uses one shot and poking ability to take down opponents before they can engage.
Custom Range Blaster.recommendation: Stay within working range of teammates with better paint output.

Clash Blaster.strengths: Large explosion radius and continuous fire mode traps opponents for easy splats.
Clash Blaster.weaknesses: No OHKO means the weapon can be rushed down on open terrain. More alert opponents cannot be exploited by it.
Clash Blaster.playstyle: Uses large explosion radius and continuous fire to exploit opponents' mistakes.
Clash Blaster.recommendation: Be aware of terrain advantages and keep an eye out for team fights where it can easily contribute.

Clash Blaster Neo.strengths: Large explosion radius and continuous fire mode traps opponents for easy splats.
Clash Blaster Neo.weaknesses: No OHKO means the weapon can be rushed down on open terrain. More alert opponents cannot be exploited by it.
Clash Blaster Neo.playstyle: Uses large explosion radius and continuous fire to exploit opponents' mistakes.
Clash Blaster Neo.recommendation: Keep an eye out for team fights where it can easily contribute. Chumps offer additional chip damage.

Rapid Blaster.strengths: Long-range indirect chip damage and a relatively fast fire rate for a blaster.
Rapid Blaster.weaknesses: Poor close-quarters combat ability and lacks a throwable, lethal sub-weapon to flush out opponents or deal burst damage.
Rapid Blaster.playstyle: Midline keep-away and support. Uses indirect blast radius to pressure opponents from a safe distance.
Rapid Blaster.recommendation: Keep your distance to avoid being rushed down. Keep awareness of where your teammates are so you can contribute to their fights.

Rapid Blaster Deco.strengths: Long-range indirect chip damage and a relatively fast fire rate for a blaster combine well with Torpedo.
Rapid Blaster Deco.weaknesses: High ink consumption and poor paint. Very vulnerable during Inkjet landing due to poor close range combat.
Rapid Blaster Deco.playstyle: Aggressive midline skirmisher. Uses Torpedos to distract or locate opponents before landing indirect/direct shots.
Rapid Blaster Deco.recommendation: Keep your distance to avoid being rushed down. Activate Inkjet when behind cover to improve your survivability when landing.

Rapid Blaster Pro.strengths: Exceptional blast range allows it to safely annoy and zone out opponents from a distance.
Rapid Blaster Pro.weaknesses: Abysmal self-defense when rushed, low paint output, and highly dependent on team coordination to capitalize on it.
Rapid Blaster Pro.playstyle: Defensive backline support. Uses range to assist frontline skirmishes and slow down enemy approaches.
Rapid Blaster Pro.recommendation: Keep awareness of where your teammates are so you can contribute to their fights.

Rapid Blaster Pro Deco.strengths: Kit has great tracking capabilities and long-range chip damage combos.
Rapid Blaster Pro Deco.weaknesses: Extremely low paint footprint, making it dependent on teammates to maintain map control, and lacks any defensive tools.
Rapid Blaster Pro Deco.playstyle: Passive midline tracker. Focuses on marking targets and dealing long-range chip damage to assist slayers.
Rapid Blaster Pro Deco.recommendation: Tag enemies with Angle Shooter to track them through walls, then use the blast radius or Killer Wail 5.1 to finish them off.

Rapid Blaster Pro WNT-R.strengths: Highly valued Tacticooler support utility combined with safe, long-range spacing.
Rapid Blaster Pro WNT-R.weaknesses: Spotty main-weapon paint makes building special points on its own slow and tedious.
Rapid Blaster Pro WNT-R.playstyle: Midline support. Focuses on placing Tacticoolers for the team while keeping enemies out of the zone with Suction Bombs.
Rapid Blaster Pro WNT-R.recommendation: Prioritize charging and deploying Tacticooler to buff your slayers. Use Suction Bombs to zone out choke points and deter flankers.

S-BLAST '92.strengths: Dual-fire mode provides excellent adaptability. Can follow up on indirect Reefslider damage.
S-BLAST '92.weaknesses: Weak sub and special kit offers minimal utility, and missing the long-range direct shot is heavily punished.
S-BLAST '92.playstyle: Flexible skirmisher. Adapts between long-range zoning on the ground and short-range defensive jumps.
S-BLAST '92.recommendation: Use Sprinkler to bait enemy attention or paint minor spots. Follow enemy movement during a Reefslide to finish off damaged survivors.

S-BLAST '91.strengths: Outstanding kit synergy with Burst Bomb, enabling highly consistent direct/indirect splash combos.
S-BLAST '91.weaknesses: High ink consumption can make it struggle without team support.
S-BLAST '91.playstyle: High-threat midline slayer. Uses Burst Bombs for mobility and chip damage during fights.
S-BLAST '91.recommendation: Don't overuse Burst Bomb - poor ink management can leave you helpless during a fight.

L-3 Nozzlenose.strengths: Good run speed while firing, excellent ink efficiency. Fast-flowing turf coverage.
L-3 Nozzlenose.weaknesses: Lacks the capability for quick or easy splat if it is caught unawares.
L-3 Nozzlenose.playstyle: Highly mobile midline skirmisher and paint support.
L-3 Nozzlenose.recommendation: L-3 struggles to fight on its own. Rely on slaying teammates for splats, and return the favor by painting.

L-3 Nozzlenose D.strengths: Good mobility combined with a more cohesive kit that patches up its standard burst-delay vulnerabilities.
L-3 Nozzlenose D.weaknesses: Lacks the capability for quick or easy splat if it is caught unawares.
L-3 Nozzlenose D.playstyle: Aggressive midline skirmisher and paint support.
L-3 Nozzlenose D.recommendation: Coordinate your movement to stay at maximum range. Avoid staying stationary in close-quarters skirmishes.

Glitterz L-3 Nozzlenose.strengths: Good run speed while firing, excellent ink efficiency. Fast-flowing turf coverage.
Glitterz L-3 Nozzlenose.weaknesses: Struggles in 1v1 fights - requires multiple trigger pulls with precise aiming.
Glitterz L-3 Nozzlenose.playstyle: Utility-focused skirmish support. Focuses on painting key paths while providing strong midline pressure.
Glitterz L-3 Nozzlenose.recommendation: Splat bomb is an important tool from disengaging from unwanted 1v1s. Keeping your distance also helps with Inkjet landings.

H-3 Nozzlenose.strengths: One-burst kill potential if all three shots connect. Excellent midline range.
H-3 Nozzlenose.weaknesses: Severe cooldown delay between bursts; missing a shot is highly punishable and immediately compromises self-defense.
H-3 Nozzlenose.playstyle: Precision midline slayer and team tracker.
H-3 Nozzlenose.recommendation: Maintain rigid spacing discipline. H-3 is an underrated painter that can reliably produce coolers as long as it has uptime.

H-3 Nozzlenose D.strengths: One-burst kill potential if all three shots connect. Excellent midline range combined with defensive kit.
H-3 Nozzlenose D.weaknesses: Struggles with being rushed down if it misses one of its three shots.
H-3 Nozzlenose D.playstyle: Midline control and defensive slayer hybrid. Uses Splash Wall and Big Bubbler set up and give it time to set up shots.
H-3 Nozzlenose D.recommendation: Maintain rigid spacing discipline. Though it can one-shot opponents, H-3 does better when assisting team fights.

H-3 Nozzlenose VIP-R.strengths: One-burst kill potential if all three shots connect. Nice mid-line range.
H-3 Nozzlenose VIP-R.weaknesses: Struggles with being rushed down if it misses one of its three shots.
H-3 Nozzlenose VIP-R.playstyle: Zoning and pick support hybrid. Uses Triple Inkstrike as an important retake tool.
H-3 Nozzlenose VIP-R.recommendation: Maintain your distance. In real gameplay, Viper H-3 can have very high paint output between all parts of its kit.

Squeezer.strengths: Great range, high damage tap shots combine well with Splash Wall to let it fight weapons with longer range.
Squeezer.weaknesses: High points for special and a lack of a bomb reduce overall flow of the kit.
Squeezer.playstyle: Mid range slayer with Trizooka for additional long range displacement.
Squeezer.recommendation: Don't forget the painting power of the continuous fire mode when attempting to get Trizooka ready.

Foil Squeezer.strengths: Great range, high accuracy, high damage tap shots. Can paint somewhat consistently with continuous fire mode.
Foil Squeezer.weaknesses: Requires higher technical skill to hit shots. Autobomb has no synergy.
Foil Squeezer.playstyle: Mid range slayer. Plays to quick time to kill with Splattercolor Screen to offer cover from enemies.
Foil Squeezer.recommendation: Don't forget the painting power of the continuous fire mode.

Carbon Roller.strengths: Speedy, stealthy slayer with extremely quick one shot kill. Capable of camping ledges and sharking small patches of ink.
Carbon Roller.weaknesses: Abysmal painting ability. Very short range means one shots are hard to do when the kit does not help.
Carbon Roller.playstyle: The ultimate sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously, especially on enemy turf or ledges.
Carbon Roller.recommendation: This kit requires relying on teammates for paint support. It is helpless without it.

Carbon Roller Deco.strengths: Speedy, stealthy slayer with extremely quick one shot kill. Capable of camping ledges and sharking small patches of ink.
Carbon Roller Deco.weaknesses: Poor painting ability. Very short range requires relying on Burst Bomb for additional damage and mobility.
Carbon Roller Deco.playstyle: The ultimate sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously, especially on enemy turf or ledges.
Carbon Roller Deco.recommendation: Relies on team support for paint coverage. Positioning for Trizooka is different to the main weapon's playstyle.

Carbon Roller ANG-L.strengths: Speedy, stealthy slayer with extremely quick one shot kill. Capable of camping ledges and sharking small patches of ink.
Carbon Roller ANG-L.weaknesses: Relies on Fizzy Bomb for mobility and chip damage, but this takes away some of its stealth.
Carbon Roller ANG-L.playstyle: The ultimate sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously, especially on enemy turf or ledges.
Carbon Roller ANG-L.recommendation: Use the paint and damage from Super Chumps to make it easier to get in on team fights.

Splat Roller.strengths: Quick one-shot swing with a wide hitbox. Can ledge camp to hold down drops.
Splat Roller.weaknesses: Low paint output and short range makes it struggle to retake space on its own.
Splat Roller.playstyle: Sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously. Can also aid other slayers with low-damage range.
Splat Roller.recommendation: Use Ninja Squid and Curling Bomb to make it harder for opponents to predict your position.

Krak-On Splat Roller.strengths: Quick one-shot swing with a wide hitbox. Can ledge camp to hold down drops.
Krak-On Splat Roller.weaknesses: Low paint output and short range makes it struggle to retake space on its own.
Krak-On Splat Roller.playstyle: Sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously. Can also aid other slayers with low-damage range.
Krak-On Splat Roller.recommendation: Use Squid Beakons to bait opponents into your range. Rely on teammates for paint.

Order Roller Replica.strengths: Quick one-shot swing with a wide hitbox. Can ledge camp to hold down drops.
Order Roller Replica.weaknesses: Low paint output and short range makes it struggle to retake space on its own.
Order Roller Replica.playstyle: Sharking slayer. Forces opponents play more cautiously. Can also aid other slayers with low-damage range.
Order Roller Replica.recommendation: Use Ninja Squid and Curling Bomb to make it harder for opponents to predict your position.

Dynamo Roller.strengths: Strong paint output and a large, deadly hitbox at range. Great under ledges. Struggles less than some anchors at being rushed.
Dynamo Roller.weaknesses: Poor ink efficiency and a very slow windup time can leave it helpless in high speed fights. No bomb.
Dynamo Roller.playstyle: Paint support with decent fighting capabilities, as long as you respect its windup time.
Dynamo Roller.recommendation: Once you've made a Tacticooler, Dynamo is freer to take fights in big team pushes.

Gold Dynamo Roller.strengths: Strong paint output and a large, deadly hitbox at range. Great under ledges. Struggles less than some anchors at being rushed.
Gold Dynamo Roller.weaknesses: Poor ink efficiency and a very slow windup time can leave it helpless in high speed fights.
Gold Dynamo Roller.playstyle: Paint support/anchor with decent fighting capabilities. Super Chumps turbo power its support power.
Gold Dynamo Roller.recommendation: Splat Bomb can poke at range, but it should be used judiciously with Dynamo's poor ink efficiency.

Starz Dynamo Roller.strengths: Strong paint output and a large, deadly hitbox at range. Great under ledges. Struggles less than some anchors at being rushed.
Starz Dynamo Roller.weaknesses: Questionable kit synergy does little to aid the main weapon or team play in coordinated settings.
Starz Dynamo Roller.playstyle: More aggressive Dynamo kit that can focus more on getting splats than support.
Starz Dynamo Roller.recommendation: Aid slaying teammates with tracking from both the relatively cheap Point Sensor and Killer Wail.

Flingza Roller.strengths: Great paint output and decent range from the vertical flick combines well with using the horizontal for traditional roller sharking.
Flingza Roller.weaknesses: Less mobile than other rollers with less consistent attacks.
Flingza Roller.playstyle: Works for paint support and Tenta Missile output to aid team.
Flingza Roller.recommendation: Be ready to follow up firing missiles to capitalize on their impact on opponents.

Foil Flingza Roller.strengths: Great paint output and decent range from the vertical flick combines well with using the horizontal for traditional roller sharking.
Foil Flingza Roller.weaknesses: Less mobile than other rollers with less consistent attacks.
Foil Flingza Roller.playstyle: Passive paint support and defensive anchor hybrid.
Foil Flingza Roller.recommendation: Prioritize safe vertical flicks to paint and keep enemies spaced. High paint output can create sharking opportunities.

Big Swig Roller.strengths: High paint output with a quick horizontal flick. Large hitbox can combo with teammates.
Big Swig Roller.weaknesses: Weak solo damage without a deadly bomb to threaten opponents.
Big Swig Roller.playstyle: Paint support with some skirmishing potential. Can use Ink Vac to protect teammates and cheese some objectives.
Big Swig Roller.recommendation: Swig has a one shot vertical flick that can camp ledges, but it is difficult to pull off and shouldn't be relied on.

Big Swig Roller Express.strengths: High paint output with a quick horizontal flick. Large hitbox can combo with teammates.
Big Swig Roller Express.weaknesses: Weak solo damage without a deadly bomb to threaten opponents.
Big Swig Roller Express.playstyle: Paint support with some skirmishing potential.
Big Swig Roller Express.recommendation: Use Ink Storm in addition to your main weapon's paint to support teammates and help take over space.

Planetz Big Swig Roller.strengths: High paint output with a quick horizontal flick. Large hitbox can combo with teammates.
Planetz Big Swig Roller.weaknesses: Weak solo damage makes it struggle in 1v1s. High paint is patchy.
Planetz Big Swig Roller.playstyle: Paint support with some skirmishing potential. Can pop Triple Splashdown in a team fight to finish off opponents.
Planetz Big Swig Roller.recommendation: Torpedo can combo with flicks to improve the odds of getting a splat.

Inkbrush.strengths: Extreme high mobility lets it move in and out of engagements quickly. Kit has great synergy with this.
Inkbrush.weaknesses: Low damage and short range makes it vulnerable in the open, especially since it requires being out of the ink.
Inkbrush.playstyle: Rat. Uses its mobility and visibility to cause distractions. Can shark in small patches for surprise attacks, but can quickly escape if it doesn't work.
Inkbrush.recommendation: It's easy to get too far ahead of your team; be aware of what they're engaged in.

Inkbrush Nouveau.strengths: Extreme high mobility lets it move in and out of engagements quickly.
Inkbrush Nouveau.weaknesses: Low damage and short range. Lack of a lethal bomb further reduces its deadliness.
Inkbrush Nouveau.playstyle: Rat. Uses its mobility and visibility to cause distractions. Can shark in small patches for surprise attacks.
Inkbrush Nouveau.recommendation: Use your mobility to drop Ink Mines in locations your teammates would like to monitor.

Octobrush.strengths: The high mobility of a brush with better damage and range. Can manouver behind other weapons faster than they can shift their aim.
Octobrush.weaknesses: Outranged by most weapons. Mobility requires it to be out of the ink, making it an easier target in open spaces.
Octobrush.playstyle: Uses mobility and visibility to cause distractions.
Octobrush.recommendation: Zipcaster works well with Octobrush's gameplan of causing disruptions.

Octobrush Nouveau.strengths: The high mobility of a brush with better damage and range. Can manouver behind other weapons faster than they can shift their aim.
Octobrush Nouveau.weaknesses: Outranged by most weapons. Mobility requires it to be out of the ink, making it an easier target in open spaces.
Octobrush Nouveau.playstyle: Uses mobility and visibility to cause distractions. Squid Beakons increase its unpredictability and force opponents off objective lines.
Octobrush Nouveau.recommendation: Use Inkstorm to provide healing and cover when planning to engage, since you'll be sliding instead of swimming.

Cometz Octobrush.strengths: The high mobility of a brush with better damage and range. Can manouver behind other weapons faster than they can shift their aim.
Cometz Octobrush.weaknesses: Outranged by most weapons. Mobility requires it to be out of the ink, making it an easier target in open spaces.
Cometz Octobrush.playstyle: Uses mobility and visibility to cause distractions. Kraken causes even more disruption to enemy plans.
Cometz Octobrush.recommendation: Autobomb is an important poking tool for an otherwise outranged weapon.

Orderbrush Replica.strengths: The high mobility of a brush with better damage and range. Can manouver behind other weapons faster than they can shift their aim.
Orderbrush Replica.weaknesses: Outranged by most weapons. Mobility requires it to be out of the ink, making it an easier target in open spaces.
Orderbrush Replica.playstyle: Uses mobility and visibility to cause distractions.
Orderbrush Replica.recommendation: Zipcaster works well with Octobrush's gameplan of causing disruptions.

Painbrush.strengths: High damage with a wide swing. Can still use brush manouvers, though it is the slowest at sliding.
Painbrush.weaknesses: Slow windup time crimps its ability to get in the first shot. Low power special weapon does little to synergize with the main.
Painbrush.playstyle: Better paint and range move it into a support/slayer role.
Painbrush.recommendation: Use curling bomb as a mobility and poking tool. Painbrush can reliably reach above ledges and attack below grates.

Painbrush Nouveau.strengths: High damage with a wide swing. Can still use brush manouvers, though it is the slowest at sliding.
Painbrush Nouveau.weaknesses: Slow windup time crimps its ability to get in the first shot. Point Sensor does little to help it get splats.
Painbrush Nouveau.playstyle: Better paint and range move it into a support/slayer role. Plays to Tenta Missiles.
Painbrush Nouveau.recommendation: Painbrush can reliably reach above ledges and attack below grates.

Painbrush BRN-Z.strengths: High damage with a wide swing. Can still use brush manouvers, though it is the slowest at sliding.
Painbrush BRN-Z.weaknesses: Slow windup time crimps its ability to get in the first shot. Ink hungry when swinging and sliding.
Painbrush BRN-Z.playstyle: Better paint and range move it into a support/slayer role.
Painbrush BRN-Z.recommendation: Splash Wall mitigates some of the issue with its windup when engaging. Still be mindful of your ink tank.

Classic Squiffer.strengths: Highly mobile, mid range sniper. Quick charge time with charge hold lets it threaten fast.
Classic Squiffer.weaknesses: Poor paint output. Quickly punished by other mid range weapons with better paint if it misses its shot.
Classic Squiffer.playstyle: Quickly moves in to threaten with one-shot kills. High mobility makes it harder to hit than other snipers.
Classic Squiffer.recommendation: Use Big Bubbler's floor paint to provide additional turf when working to secure an area.

New Squiffer.strengths: Highly mobile, mid range sniper. Quick charge time with charge hold lets it threaten fast.
New Squiffer.weaknesses: Poor paint output. Quickly punished by other mid range weapons with better paint if it misses its shot.
New Squiffer.playstyle: Quickly moves in to threaten with one-shot kills. Zipcaster is an additional mobility tool to increase its presence on the stage.
New Squiffer.recommendation: Rely on teammates' paint to give you territory to work with.

Splat Charger.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Splat Charger.weaknesses: Poor close combat ability. Laser gives away its location unless the player works to hide it.
Splat Charger.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
Splat Charger.recommendation: Though chargers work best on perches, don't be afraid to work at ground level if that position supports team fights better.

Z+F Splat Charger.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Z+F Splat Charger.weaknesses: Poor close combat ability. Laser gives away its location unless the player works to hide it.
Z+F Splat Charger.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches. Splash Wall gives it temporary protection from threats.
Z+F Splat Charger.recommendation: Though chargers work best on perches, don't be afraid to work at ground level if that position supports team fights better.

Splat Charger CAM-O.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Splat Charger CAM-O.weaknesses: Poor close range combat is compounded by lack of a bomb or Splash Wall for protection.
Splat Charger CAM-O.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
Splat Charger CAM-O.recommendation: Use sprinkler to charge Crabs more quickly. Use Crab to become a more stable anchor when needed.

Order Charger Replica.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Order Charger Replica.weaknesses: Poor close combat ability. Laser gives away its location unless the player works to hide it.
Order Charger Replica.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
Order Charger Replica.recommendation: Though chargers work best on perches, don't be afraid to work at ground level if that position supports team fights better.

Splatterscope.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Splatterscope.weaknesses: Poor close combat ability. Laser gives away its location. Scope restricts peripheral vision.
Splatterscope.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
Splatterscope.recommendation: Though chargers work best on perches, don't be afraid to work at ground level if that position supports team fights better.

Z+F Splatterscope.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Z+F Splatterscope.weaknesses: Poor close combat ability. Scope restricts its peripheral vision.
Z+F Splatterscope.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches. Splash Wall gives it temporary protection from threats.
Z+F Splatterscope.recommendation: Though chargers work best on perches, don't be afraid to work at ground level if that position supports team fights better.

Splatterscope CAM-O.strengths: Long range sniper with average mobility. Can lock down open spaces and chokepoints with one-shot kill.
Splatterscope CAM-O.weaknesses: Poor close range combat is compounded by lack of a bomb or Splash Wall for protection. Scope restricts peripheral vision.
Splatterscope CAM-O.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
Splatterscope CAM-O.recommendation: Use sprinkler to charge Crabs more quickly. Use Crab to become a more stable anchor when needed.

E-liter 4K.strengths: Longest range in the game. Locks down chokepoints and open sightlines with one-shot potential.
E-liter 4K.weaknesses: Low mobility and terrible close-quarters combat. Always a prime target for enemies.
E-liter 4K.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches. Skilled players instill fear.
E-liter 4K.recommendation: Keep teammates in front and maintain situational awareness to avoid being rushed down.

Custom E-liter 4K.strengths: Longest range in the game. Locks down chokepoints and open sightlines with one-shot potential.
Custom E-liter 4K.weaknesses: Low mobility and terrible close-quarters combat. Always a prime target for enemies.
Custom E-liter 4K.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches. Skilled players instill fear.
Custom E-liter 4K.recommendation: Use Squid Beakons to get back into the action fast or retreat quickly.

E-liter 4K Scope.strengths: Longest range in the game. Locks down chokepoints and open sightlines with one-shot potential.
E-liter 4K Scope.weaknesses: Low mobility and terrible close-quarters combat. Scope restricts peripheral vision.
E-liter 4K Scope.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches.
E-liter 4K Scope.recommendation: Keep teammates in front and maintain situational awareness to avoid being rushed down.

Custom E-liter 4K Scope.strengths: Longest range in the game. Locks down chokepoints and open sightlines with one-shot potential.
Custom E-liter 4K Scope.weaknesses: Low mobility and terrible close-quarters combat. Scope restricts peripheral vision. Always a prime target for enemies.
Custom E-liter 4K Scope.playstyle: Holds positions and locks down easy enemy approaches. Skilled players instill fear.
Custom E-liter 4K Scope.recommendation: Use Squid Beakons to get back into the action fast or retreat quickly.

Bamboozler 14 Mk I.strengths: Fast moving sniper with quick charge time and consistent range during its charge. Can get get quick splats with a double-tap.
Bamboozler 14 Mk I.weaknesses: Paints poorly and unevenly. Bullied by longer range threats. No one-shot means it struggles in 1v1s if the player does not have precise aim.
Bamboozler 14 Mk I.playstyle: Fast moving anchor. Offers powerful damage at a distance to aid teammates in a fight.
Bamboozler 14 Mk I.recommendation: Use Killer Wail to finish off partially damaged opponents. Keep spacing from short range opponents to give time to hit both shots.

Bamboozler 14 Mk II.strengths: Fast moving sniper with quick charge time and consistent range during its charge. Can get get quick splats with a double-tap or in combination with its kit.
Bamboozler 14 Mk II.weaknesses: Paints poorly and unevenly. Bullied by longer range threats. No one-shot means it struggles in 1v1s if the player does not have precise aim.
Bamboozler 14 Mk II.playstyle: Fast moving anchor. Offers powerful damage at a distance to aid teammates in a fight.
Bamboozler 14 Mk II.recommendation: Super Chumps and Fizzy both compliment Bamboo's quick 85 damage full charge. Play your distance to take advantage.

Goo Tuber.strengths: Extended charge hold and one-hit splat at less than a full charge sets it apart from other snipers.
Goo Tuber.weaknesses: Short range for its charge time means it has a low margin for error.
Goo Tuber.playstyle: Goo Tuber's extended charge hold allows it to charge safely behind teammates, then swim forward to pick threats more aggressively than traditional snipers can.
Goo Tuber.recommendation: Combine shots with Torpedo damage, and play towards Tenta Missiles for team help.

Custom Goo Tuber.strengths: Extended charge hold and one-hit splat at less than a full charge sets it apart from other snipers.
Custom Goo Tuber.weaknesses: Short range for its charge time means it has a low margin for error.
Custom Goo Tuber.playstyle: Goo Tuber's extended charge hold allows it to charge safely behind teammates, then swim forward to pick threats more aggressively than traditional snipers can.
Custom Goo Tuber.recommendation: Combine shots with Fizzy Bomb damage. Ultra Stamp can cause havoc when you and your team get enemies in close quarters.

Snipewriter 5H.strengths: Great paint output and long range damage combine with a great special weapon for team support.
Snipewriter 5H.weaknesses: Like other chargers, it struggles in close range. Does not have the one-shot kill at range fear factor.
Snipewriter 5H.playstyle: Uses long range and high paint output to make it harder for enemies to enter areas.
Snipewriter 5H.recommendation: Play to support teammates with paint and Tacticooler. Don't discount its killing power when needed.

Snipewriter 5B.strengths: Great paint output and long range damage combine with a great special weapon for team support.
Snipewriter 5B.weaknesses: Like other chargers, it struggles in close range. Does not have the one-shot kill at range fear factor.
Snipewriter 5B.playstyle: Uses long range high paint output, and Ink Storm to make it harder for enemies to enter areas.
Snipewriter 5B.recommendation: Don't discount Pencil's killing power with its double tap. Use Splash Wall and Inkstorm to control areas.

Slosher.strengths: Consistent projectile damage at mid range reaches enemies in many places. Kit gives it options for retake and holds.
Slosher.weaknesses: Slow fire rate requires the user to have good aim and awareness to win fights.
Slosher.playstyle: Strong skirmisher and fighter. Respectable paint output also allows it to work well with ink-hungry teammates.
Slosher.recommendation: Watch your ink consumption, especially if using Splat Bomb liberally.

Slosher Deco.strengths: Consistent projectile damage at mid range reaches enemies in many places. Respectable paint output from the main.
Slosher Deco.weaknesses: Kit does not synergize well with the main weapon. No bomb means it has no spacing tool, and the main does not work well with Zipcaster.
Slosher Deco.playstyle: Strong skirmisher and fighter. Can tag enemies at a distance with Angle Shooter.
Slosher Deco.recommendation: Angle Shooter combos with the main weapon. Use Zip Caster to disrupt enemy activities.

Order Slosher Replica.strengths: Consistent projectile damage at mid range reaches enemies in many places. Kit gives it options for retake and holds.
Order Slosher Replica.weaknesses: Slow fire rate requires the user to have good aim and awareness to win fights.
Order Slosher Replica.playstyle: Strong skirmisher and fighter. Respectable paint output also allows it to work well with ink-hungry teammates.
Order Slosher Replica.recommendation: Watch your ink consumption, especially if using Splat Bomb liberally.

Tri-Slosher.strengths: Fast mobility, quick fire rate, and wide coverage around corners and ledges
Tri-Slosher.weaknesses: Short range makes it a poor fighter on open sightlines, especially without a lethal bomb to support it.
Tri-Slosher.playstyle: Quickly moves to take control of key positions. Inkjet offers additional firepower at key moments.
Tri-Slosher.recommendation: Stay active. Allow teammates with better range to hold positions you take, rather than trying to hold them yourself.

Tri-Slosher Nouveau.strengths: Fast mobility, quick fire rate, and wide coverage around corners and ledges
Tri-Slosher Nouveau.weaknesses: Short range makes it a poor fighter on open sightlines.
Tri-Slosher Nouveau.playstyle: Quickly moves to take control of key positions. Can poke areas out of reach with Fizzy Bomb.
Tri-Slosher Nouveau.recommendation: Combine weapon damage with Fizzy Bomb for more reliable splats. Tacticooler buffs help it stay active.

Tri-Slosher ASH-N.strengths: Fast mobility, quick fire rate, and wide coverage around corners and ledges
Tri-Slosher ASH-N.weaknesses: Short range makes it a poor fighter on open sightlines. Special weapon does not provide additional firepower.
Tri-Slosher ASH-N.playstyle: Quickly moves to take control of key positions. Splattercolor Screen covers its movements.
Tri-Slosher ASH-N.recommendation: Stay active. Allow teammates with better range to hold positions you take, rather than trying to hold them yourself.

Sloshing Machine.strengths: High damage with a large projectile makes getting combos with the weapon or Fizzy Bomb easy.
Sloshing Machine.weaknesses: Middling firing rate and lower mobility requires precision to not get outpaced by other slayers at this range. High points for special limits Booyah Bomb creation.
Sloshing Machine.recommendation: Abuse the arcing projectile to pressure opponents hiding behind ledges, ramps, or obstacles. Booyah Bomb challenges larger areas.

Sloshing Machine Neo.strengths: High damage with a large projectile that combos with itself and can hit multiple opponents.
Sloshing Machine Neo.weaknesses: Middling fire rate and lower mobility requires precision to not get outpaced by other slayers at this range. No combo damage from its kit.
Sloshing Machine Neo.recommendation: Abuse the arcing projectile to pressure opponents hiding behind ledges, ramps, or obstacles. Use Trizooka to challenge opponents that are out of range.

Bloblobber.strengths: High paint output at range, and unique bouncing projectiles that can hit opponents around corners or even behind the player.
Bloblobber.weaknesses: Despite how far the blobs travel, the fighting range of the weapon is much smaller and requires hitting all four for a kill.
Bloblobber.playstyle: Heavy paint suppression at a distance with chip damage.
Bloblobber.recommendation: This kit plays for paint suppression. Ink Storm aids it's ability to paint and do damage at a distance

Bloblobber Deco.strengths: High paint output at range, and unique bouncing projectiles that can hit opponents around corners or even behind the player.
Bloblobber Deco.weaknesses: The fighting range of the weapon is much smaller than it seems and requires hitting all four blobs for a kill.
Bloblobber Deco.playstyle: Attempts to be a more aggressive Blob. The Kraken Royale special requires taking up space with the main instead of passive painting.
Bloblobber Deco.recommendation: This kit attempts to be a more aggressive version of Blob. Use Kraken Royale to win-out engagements.

Explosher.strengths: Great suppression at a distance, between paint output and large exploding projectiles.
Explosher.weaknesses: Abysmal at close combat - needs to land two very slow shots to get a kill.
Explosher.playstyle: Suppressive anchor. Exploits elevation differences to move opponents out of areas.
Explosher.recommendation: Keep your distance and let your teammates work ahead of you. Try not to be caught out alone.

Custom Explosher.strengths: Great suppression at a distance, between paint output and large exploding projectiles.
Custom Explosher.weaknesses: Abysmal at close combat - needs to land two very slow shots to get a kill.
Custom Explosher.playstyle: Suppressive anchor. Exploits elevation differences to move opponents out of areas.
Custom Explosher.recommendation: Use Triple Splashdown in conjunction with your team. You'll be helpless by yourself if you fail to knock all enemies out.

Dread Wringer.strengths: Overwhelming high paint output at decent range. Flung projectiles can hit over obstacles.
Dread Wringer.weaknesses: Slow fire rate means it struggles with being rushed down. Difficult to hit mobile opponents with both projectiles.
Dread Wringer.playstyle: Paint support at mid range that zones out all but longer ranged opponents.
Dread Wringer.recommendation: Reefslider can leave the player in bad positions if not used carefully. Use as a team play.

Dread Wringer D.strengths: Overwhelming high paint output at decent range. Flung projectiles can hit over obstacles.
Dread Wringer D.weaknesses: Slow fire rate means it struggles with being rushed down. Kit does not provide any tools to mitigate this weakness.
Dread Wringer D.playstyle: Paint support at mid range that zones out all but longer ranged opponents.
Dread Wringer D.recommendation: Kit attempts to maximize map control by offering Squid Beakons for jumps and opponent tracking with Wave Breaker.

Hornz Dread Wringer.strengths: Overwhelming high paint output at decent range. Flung projectiles can hit over obstacles.
Hornz Dread Wringer.weaknesses: Slow fire rate means it struggles with being rushed down. Difficult to hit mobile opponents with both projectiles.
Hornz Dread Wringer.playstyle: Paint support at mid range that zones out all but longer ranged opponents.
Hornz Dread Wringer.recommendation: More stable version of Dread with Crab Tank to hold positions on offense.

Mini Splatling.strengths: Quick charge time, high stafing mobility, and high fire rate can result in quick splats. Burst Bomb aids in damage.
Mini Splatling.weaknesses: Has the high out-of-ink time of a Splatling but with limited range. Easy pickings when charging a round.
Mini Splatling.playstyle: High paint slayer. Uses additional damage from kit element to increase its deadliness.
Mini Splatling.recommendation: Let your teammates hold enemy attention during team fights to reduce the downside Splatling-style walk and shoot.

Zink Mini Splatling.strengths: Quick charge time, high stafing mobility, and high fire rate can result in quick splats.
Zink Mini Splatling.weaknesses: Has the high standing time of a Splatling but with limited range. Kit does not offer additional damage.
Zink Mini Splatling.playstyle: High paint slayer with tools to hold space and slow down enemies.
Zink Mini Splatling.recommendation: Big Bubbler helps it hold down positions it can't hold with its own range.

Mini Splatling RTL-R.strengths: Quick charge time, high stafing mobility, and high fire rate can result in quick splats.
Mini Splatling RTL-R.weaknesses: Has the high out-of-ink time of a Splatling but with limited range. Easy pickings when charging a round.
Mini Splatling RTL-R.playstyle: High paint slayer that plays to creating long range threats with Trizooka.
Mini Splatling RTL-R.recommendation: Beakons can help your teammates get in. Let them hold attention during fight to mitigate the drawbacks of Splatling-style walk and shoot.

Heavy Splatling.strengths: High paint output combined with long range. Reasonably quick time-to-kill in close combat if it gets jumped.
Heavy Splatling.weaknesses: High out-of-ink time makes it easy pickings for longer ranged opponents or AOE ledge campers.
Heavy Splatling.playstyle: Zones out opponents with high paint output from a distance.
Heavy Splatling.recommendation: Support more aggressive teammates with paint and damage from afar. Use Wave Breaker to locate opponents and stay active.

Heavy Splatling Deco.strengths: High paint output combined with long range. Reasonably quick time-to-kill in close combat if it gets jumped.
Heavy Splatling Deco.weaknesses: High out-of-ink time makes it easy pickings for longer ranged opponents or AOE ledge campers.
Heavy Splatling Deco.playstyle: Zones out opponents with high paint output from a distance.
Heavy Splatling Deco.recommendation: Support more aggressive teammates with paint and damage from afar. Kraken Royale lets it make plays in close quarters.

Order Splatling Replica.strengths: High paint output combined with long range. Reasonably quick time-to-kill in close combat if it gets jumped.
Order Splatling Replica.weaknesses: High out-of-ink time makes it easy pickings for longer ranged opponents or AOE ledge campers.
Order Splatling Replica.playstyle: Zones out opponents with high paint output from a distance.
Order Splatling Replica.recommendation: Support more aggressive teammates with paint and damage from afar. Use Wave Breaker to locate opponents and stay active.

Hydra Splatling.strengths: Longest ranged non-sniper, with the highest DPS in the game when fully charged. Less helpless in close quarters than similar ranged weapons.
Hydra Splatling.weaknesses: Very slow movement and a glacial charge time makes it slow to react to game state changes.
Hydra Splatling.playstyle: High DPS anchor, able to both get picks and provide suppressive paint.
Hydra Splatling.recommendation: Be willing to switch smoothly between damage and paint midcharge. Autobomb lets it sniff threats and cover its retreat.

Custom Hydra Splatling.strengths: Longest ranged non-sniper, with the highest DPS in the game when fully charged. Less helpless in close quarters than similar ranged weapons.
Custom Hydra Splatling.weaknesses: Very slow movement and a glacial charge time makes it slow to react to game state changes.
Custom Hydra Splatling.playstyle: High DPS anchor, able to both get picks and provide suppressive paint.
Custom Hydra Splatling.recommendation: Be willing to switch smoothly between damage and paint midcharge. Appreciates the flank monitoring utility of Ink Mine.

Torrentz Hydra Splatling.strengths: Longest ranged non-sniper, with the highest DPS in the game when fully charged. Less helpless in close quarters than similar ranged weapons.
Torrentz Hydra Splatling.weaknesses: Very slow movement and a glacial charge time makes it slow to react to game state changes.
Torrentz Hydra Splatling.playstyle: High DPS anchor, able to both get picks and provide suppressive paint.
Torrentz Hydra Splatling.recommendation: Be willing to switch smoothly between damage and paint midcharge. Big Bubbler allows Hydra to hold down a contested position long enough to prep at least a partial charge.

Ballpoint Splatling.strengths: Dual firing modes give it extreme flexibility between close range painting and fighting and long range threat.
Ballpoint Splatling.weaknesses: Difficult to use. Delayed long range mode makes it difficult to challenge similarly ranged weapons.
Ballpoint Splatling.playstyle: Area-denial defensive anchor and paint support.
Ballpoint Splatling.recommendation: Use your short-range state to quickly paint areas and charge special. Inkjet is powerful, as long as it's not at risk of being sniped.

Ballpoint Splatling Nouveau.strengths: Dual firing modes give it extreme flexibility between close range painting and fighting and long range threat.
Ballpoint Splatling Nouveau.weaknesses: Difficult to use. Delayed long range mode makes it almost impossible to challenge similarly ranged weapons.
Ballpoint Splatling Nouveau.playstyle: Area-denial defensive anchor and paint support.
Ballpoint Splatling Nouveau.recommendation: Plant Ink Mines on flanks before taking a position. Use your short-range state to quickly paint areas and charge special.

Nautilus 47.strengths: Unique charge hold mechanic allows it better mobility than most Splatlings. Quick fire rate dovetails with this.
Nautilus 47.weaknesses: Low ink efficiency and poor paint makes it struggle by itself.
Nautilus 47.playstyle: Midline slayer. Uses Point Sensor to continue tracking opponents.
Nautilus 47.recommendation: Naut needs some paint support from teammates to fully take advantage of its playstyle.

Nautilus 79.strengths: Unique charge hold mechanic allows it better mobility than most Splatlings. Quick fire rate dovetails with this.
Nautilus 79.weaknesses: Low ink efficiency and poor paint makes it struggle by itself.
Nautilus 79.playstyle: Midline slaying with a good toolkit to aid it.
Nautilus 79.recommendation: Using the whole kit in combination makes Naut 79 deadly.

Heavy Edit Splatling.strengths: High paint output makes producing Tacticoolers easy for this weapon. High fire rate makes it not helpless in a fight.
Heavy Edit Splatling.weaknesses: Exceptionally long charge time for its range create gaps in its activity.
Heavy Edit Splatling.playstyle: High uptime paint support. Paints with Tacticooler production in mind.
Heavy Edit Splatling.recommendation: Paint to support more aggressive teammates. Curling Bomb is a useful escape tool.

Heavy Edit Splatling Nouveau.strengths: High paint output makes producing Tacticoolers easy for this weapon. High fire rate makes it not helpless in a fight.
Heavy Edit Splatling Nouveau.weaknesses: Exceptionally long charge time for its range create gaps in its activity.
Heavy Edit Splatling Nouveau.playstyle: High uptime paint support. Paints for more aggressive teammates.
Heavy Edit Splatling Nouveau.recommendation: Use Crab Tank as a long range option to stabilize holds where the Hedit itself can't.

Dapple Dualies.strengths: High mobility combined with dualie rolling. High damage bullets and rapid fire rate.
Dapple Dualies.weaknesses: Puny range ruins its survivability, reducing its output of key special Tacticooler.
Dapple Dualies.playstyle: Rat support. Uses high mobility and Squid Beakons to disrupt and distract.
Dapple Dualies.recommendation: Needs its teammates to move fast to compliment its dive in and cause trouble playstyle.

Dapple Dualies Nouveau.strengths: High mobility combined with dualie rolling. High damage bullets and rapid fire rate.
Dapple Dualies Nouveau.weaknesses: Puny range and smaller dodge rolls reduce its fighting capacity. High visibility is hard to follow up on.
Dapple Dualies Nouveau.playstyle: Rat fighter. Draws opponent attention then runs them over with Reefslider.
Dapple Dualies Nouveau.recommendation: Needs its teammates to move fast to compliment its dive in and cause trouble playstyle.

Dapple Dualies NOC-T.strengths: High mobility combined with dualie rolling. High damage bullets and rapid fire rate.
Dapple Dualies NOC-T.weaknesses: Puny range and smaller dodge rolls reduce its fighting capacity. High visibility is hard to follow up on.
Dapple Dualies NOC-T.playstyle: Rat Fighter. Has a great tool in Splat Bomb to cover itself when disengaging or to get revenge kills.
Dapple Dualies NOC-T.recommendation: Needs its teammates to move fast to compliment its dive in and cause trouble playstyle.

Splat Dualies.strengths: Average fire rate and range combine with dodge rolls to make a mobile fighter with decent paint.
Splat Dualies.weaknesses: Countered by weapons that have higher damage or longer range that haven't sacrificed too much mobility.
Splat Dualies.playstyle: Slayer/skirmisher flex. Easily moves into different roles depending on game state.
Splat Dualies.recommendation: In addition to the main weapon flexing between slaying, skirmishing, and painting, Crab Tank lets it anchor.

Enperry Splat Dualies.strengths: Average fire rate and range combine with dodge rolls to make a mobile fighter with decent paint.
Enperry Splat Dualies.weaknesses: Countered by weapons that have higher damage or longer range that haven't sacrificed too much mobility.
Enperry Splat Dualies.playstyle: Slayer/skirmisher flex. Easily moves into different roles depending on game state.
Enperry Splat Dualies.recommendation: Dodge rolls make unsuccessful Triple Splashdowns less punished.

Twinklez Splat Dualies.strengths: Average fire rate and range combine with dodge rolls to make a mobile fighter with decent paint.
Twinklez Splat Dualies.weaknesses: Countered by weapons that have higher damage or longer range that haven't sacrificed too much mobility.
Twinklez Splat Dualies.playstyle: Slayer/skirmisher flex. Easily moves into different roles depending on game state.
Twinklez Splat Dualies.recommendation: Fizzy gives it even more mobility, and Big Bubbler lets it hold a position better when trying to secure it.

Order Dualie Replicas.strengths: Average fire rate and range combine with dodge rolls to make a mobile fighter with decent paint.
Order Dualie Replicas.weaknesses: Countered by weapons that have higher damage or longer range that haven't sacrificed too much mobility.
Order Dualie Replicas.playstyle: Slayer/skirmisher flex. Easily moves into different roles depending on game state.
Order Dualie Replicas.recommendation: In addition to the main weapon flexing between slaying, skirmishing, and painting, Crab Tank lets it anchor.

Glooga Dualies.strengths: Increased damage and range after dodge rolling makes it deadly in engagements. Splash Wall allows it to play in open spaces better.
Glooga Dualies.weaknesses: Slow fire rate and long endlag after rolling. Patchy turfing.
Glooga Dualies.playstyle: Midline fighter. Splash Wall allows it to engage in open space and with longer ranged threats than itself.
Glooga Dualies.recommendation: Though not as bad at painting as some weapons, Gloogas still appreciates teammates with paint support.

Glooga Dualies Deco.strengths: Increased damage and range after dodge rolling makes it deadly in engagements.
Glooga Dualies Deco.weaknesses: Slow fire rate and long endlag after rolling. Patchy turfing.
Glooga Dualies Deco.playstyle: Midline fighter. Trizooka allows it to move long range threats.
Glooga Dualies Deco.recommendation: Though not as bad at painting as some weapons, Gloogas still appreciates teammates with paint support.

Dualie Squelchers.strengths: Good mobility due to its jump tech, good painting ability, and enough gear space for bombs.
Dualie Squelchers.weaknesses: Relatively slow 4-shot splat and wide shot spread during standard dual-reticle fire.
Dualie Squelchers.playstyle: Midline skirmisher and dynamic paint support.
Dualie Squelchers.recommendation: Preserve spacing advantage in fights. Even wider dual-reticle fire can assist teammates.

Custom Dualie Squelchers.strengths: Good support options between painting ability, good shot distance, and kit utility.
Custom Dualie Squelchers.weaknesses: Relatively slow 4-shot splat and wide shot spread during standard dual-reticle fire.
Custom Dualie Squelchers.playstyle: Midline skirmisher and dynamic paint support.
Custom Dualie Squelchers.recommendation: Preserve spacing advantage in fights. Even wider dual-reticle fire can assist teammates.

Hoofz Dualie Squelchers.strengths: Good support options between painting ability, good shot distance, and kit utility.
Hoofz Dualie Squelchers.weaknesses: Relatively slow 4-shot splat and wide shot spread during standard dual-reticle fire.
Hoofz Dualie Squelchers.playstyle: Midline skirmisher and dynamic paint support.
Hoofz Dualie Squelchers.recommendation: Preserve spacing advantage in fights. Even wider dual-reticle fire can assist teammates.

Dark Tetra Dualies.strengths: Excellent mobility thanks to fast movement speed and unique quad roll that allow it to fire during the roll.
Dark Tetra Dualies.weaknesses: Poor fire rate, range, and damage. Dual reticle mode decreases its accuracy even more. End lag after rolls is high.
Dark Tetra Dualies.playstyle: Traditional skirmisher. Distracts, stalls, and harasses the opponents.
Dark Tetra Dualies.recommendation: Use Reefslider at key moments. Though Tetras can roll out of harms way, bad usage can be worse than not using it at all.

Light Tetra Dualies.strengths: Excellent mobility thanks to fast movement speed and unique quad roll that allow it to fire during the roll.
Light Tetra Dualies.weaknesses: Poor fire rate, range, and damage. Dual reticle mode decreases its accuracy even more. Sprinkler offers little combat utility.
Light Tetra Dualies.playstyle: Traditional skirmisher. Distracts, stalls, and harasses the opponents.
Light Tetra Dualies.recommendation: Zipcaster offers additional opportunities to cause havoc. Use this at opportunities your team can capitalize on.

Douser Dualies FF.strengths: Long range in dual reticle mode comparable to Squeezer and Jet paints and chips well for teammates. High DPS in turret mode.
Douser Dualies FF.weaknesses: Only one dodge roll with high ink consumption and endlag needs to be used judiciously to not get punished.
Douser Dualies FF.playstyle: Mobile anchor that flexes to support and skirmishing when needed. Very flexible.
Douser Dualies FF.recommendation: Douser's flexibility allows it to play well in open spaces. Killer Wail's quick activation time complements dualies well.

Custom Douser Dualies FF.strengths: Long range in dual reticle mode comparable to Squeezer and Jet paints and chips well for teammates. High DPS in turret mode.
Custom Douser Dualies FF.weaknesses: Only one dodge roll with high ink consumption and endlag needs to be used judiciously to not get punished.
Custom Douser Dualies FF.playstyle: Mobile anchor that flexes to support and skirmishing when needed. Very flexible.
Custom Douser Dualies FF.recommendation: Douser's flexibility allows it to play well in open spaces. Triple Inkstrike allows it to move into space.

Splat Brella.strengths: Brella shield allows it to hold spaces and stall out fights. Buffed paint output gives it more map control.
Splat Brella.weaknesses: Brella shield is pretty useless against AOE weapons that can fire over or around it.
Splat Brella.playstyle: Supports through paint output and by restricting the movements of opponents. Helps in skirmishes by taking attention.
Splat Brella.recommendation: Brella plays best when working with teammates - use shield for survivability and use pellets to chip opponents.

Sorella Brella.strengths: Brella shield allows it to hold spaces and stall out fights. Buffed paint output gives it more map control.
Sorella Brella.weaknesses: Brella shield is pretty useless against AOE weapons that can fire over or around it.
Sorella Brella.playstyle: Supports through paint output and by restricting the movements of opponents. Helps in skirmishes by taking attention.
Sorella Brella.recommendation: Use shield for survivability and use pellets to chip opponents. Brella is a rare weapon that can protect its own Inkjet landing.

Order Brella Replica.strengths: Brella canopy shield allows it to hold spaces and stall out fights. Buffed paint output gives it more map control.
Order Brella Replica.weaknesses: Brella canopy is pretty useless against AOE weapons that can fire over or around it.
Order Brella Replica.playstyle: Supports through paint output and by restricting the movements of opponents. Helps in skirmishes by taking attention.
Order Brella Replica.recommendation: Brella plays best when working with teammates - use shield for survivability and use pellets to chip opponents.

Tenta Brella.strengths: Large brella canopy shield with high HP gives it ultimate survivability. Canopy is large enough to protect multiple players. One-shot at close range.
Tenta Brella.weaknesses: Slow movement and shield deployment time. Ink inefficient. Canopy can be shot around by AOE weapons. Kit has no extra damage.
Tenta Brella.playstyle: Slow skirmisher. Can hold spaces for a long time and be challenging to remove from an area.
Tenta Brella.recommendation: The Tent canopy is an important tool for helping players move into spaces. Hide in shield for surprise one-hit kills or popping Ink Vac.

Tenta Sorella Brella.strengths: Large brella canopy shield with high HP gives it ultimate survivability. Canopy is large enough to protect multiple players. One-shot at close range.
Tenta Sorella Brella.weaknesses: Slow movement and shield deployment time. Ink inefficient. Canopy can be shot around by AOE weapons.
Tenta Sorella Brella.playstyle: Slow skirmisher. Can hold spaces for a long time and be challenging to remove from an area. Hides in shield for surprise one-hit kills.
Tenta Sorella Brella.recommendation: The Tent canopy is an important tool for helping players move into spaces. Gives extra protection when firing Trizooka.

Tenta Brella CRE-M.strengths: Large brella canopy shield with high HP gives it ultimate survivability. Canopy is large enough to protect multiple players. One-shot at close range.
Tenta Brella CRE-M.weaknesses: Slow movement and shield deployment time. Ink inefficient. Canopy can be shot around by AOE weapons.
Tenta Brella CRE-M.playstyle: Slow skirmisher. Can hold spaces for a long time. Supportive kit is designed for area control.
Tenta Brella CRE-M.recommendation: The Tent canopy is an important tool for helping players move into spaces. Hide in shield for surprise one-hit kills.

Undercover Brella.strengths: Canopy regenerates immediately upon securing a splat or assist. Allows simultaneous firing while keeping its shield raised.
Undercover Brella.weaknesses: Low shield HP can be shredded easily. Short range and weak damage.
Undercover Brella.playstyle: Rat support. Works to get behind opponents, cause distractions, and use its canopy shield to extend them.
Undercover Brella.recommendation: Abuse natural cover to retreat the moment your canopy pops. Coordinate with your slayers to collect assists during team fights to keep your canopy active.

Undercover Sorella Brella.strengths: Canopy regenerates immediately upon securing a splat or assist. Allows simultaneous firing while keeping its shield raised.
Undercover Sorella Brella.weaknesses: Low shield HP can be shredded easily. Short range and weak damage.
Undercover Sorella Brella.playstyle: Rat support. Works to get behind opponents, cause distractions, and use its canopy shield to extend them.
Undercover Sorella Brella.recommendation: Combo Torpedo damage with the main weapon. Coordinate with your slayers to collect assists during team fights to keep your canopy active.

Patternz Undercover Brella.strengths: Canopy regenerates immediately upon securing a splat or assist. Allows simultaneous firing while keeping its shield raised.
Patternz Undercover Brella.weaknesses: Low shield HP can be shredded easily. Short range and weak damage.
Patternz Undercover Brella.playstyle: Rat support. Works to get behind opponents, cause distractions, and use its canopy shield to extend them.
Patternz Undercover Brella.recommendation: Combo Killer Wail damage with the main weapon. Coordinate with your slayers to collect assists during team fights to keep your canopy active.

Recycled Brella 24 Mk I.strengths: Good accuracy for a brella makes it a more capable as a fighter. Shield deploys, launches, and regenerates quickly.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk I.weaknesses: Shield is flimsy. Cannot one shot opponents. Few kit tools for retake.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk I.playstyle: More fighting-oriented Brella. Treats the canopy as a cheap disposable instead of a persistent wall to hide behind.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk I.recommendation: Rely on teammate tools for retake. Comboing with Angle Shooter is a quicker way to get a splat.

Recycled Brella 24 Mk II.strengths: Good accuracy for a brella makes it a more capable as a fighter. Shield deploys, launches, and regenerates quickly.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk II.weaknesses: Shield is flimsy. Cannot one shot opponents. Few kit tools for retake.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk II.playstyle: More fighting-oriented Brella. Treats the canopy as a cheap disposable instead of a persistent wall to hide behind.
Recycled Brella 24 Mk II.recommendation: Rely on teammate tools for retake. Treat Triple Splashdown as a counter offensive trap instead of a retake tool.

Tri-Stringer.strengths: Good area denial between paint output and exploding projectiles. Arcing shots can get snipes behind cover that other anchors can't.
Tri-Stringer.weaknesses: Struggles when being rushed down. One-shot is harder to hit than other long range weapons.
Tri-Stringer.playstyle: Mobile anchor. Holds areas with faster movement than other weapons in is range class. Uses Killer Wail to move threats.
Tri-Stringer.recommendation: Use Toxic Mist to slow down enemies in key areas. This lets your teammates or your own damage finish them off.

Inkline Tri-Stringer.strengths: Good area denial between paint output and exploding projectiles. Arcing shots can get snipes behind cover that other anchors can't.
Inkline Tri-Stringer.weaknesses: Struggles when being rushed down. One-shot is harder to hit than other long range weapons.
Inkline Tri-Stringer.playstyle: Mobile anchor. Holds areas with faster movement than other weapons in is range class.
Inkline Tri-Stringer.recommendation: Inkline has better broad area control than the vanilla kit. Use Chumps to lock down areas your team wants to move into.

Bulbz Tri-Stringer.strengths: Good area denial between paint output and exploding projectiles. Arcing shots can get snipes behind cover that other anchors can't.
Bulbz Tri-Stringer.weaknesses: Struggles when being rushed down. One-shot is harder to hit than other long range weapons.
Bulbz Tri-Stringer.playstyle: Mobile anchor. Holds areas with faster movement than other weapons in is range class.
Bulbz Tri-Stringer.recommendation: Inkjet is a dynamic special with better offensive power than the main. Just beware using it when facing opponents that can snipe it out of the air.
