Order Stringer Replica.strengths: Good area denial between paint output and exploding projectiles. Arcing shots can get snipes behind cover that other anchors can't.
Order Stringer Replica.weaknesses: Struggles when being rushed down. One-shot is harder to hit than other long range weapons.
Order Stringer Replica.playstyle: Mobile anchor. Holds areas with faster movement than other weapons in is range class. Uses Killer Wail to move threats.
Order Stringer Replica.recommendation: Use Toxic Mist to slow down enemies in key areas. This lets your teammates or your own damage finish them off.

REEF-LUX 450.strengths: Extreme high paint output with powerful displacement special. Can hold charge while swimming for quick mid-range snipe.
REEF-LUX 450.weaknesses: Inconsistent damage when it doesn't have time to line up a shot, which is rarely does.
REEF-LUX 450.playstyle: Plays to paint support and charge Tenta Missiles to disrupt opponent plans. Can defend itself when needed.
REEF-LUX 450.recommendation: It's less independent as a slayer, so it needs back up from other frontline weapons or other support weapons.

REEF-LUX 450 Deco.strengths: Extreme high paint output with powerful displacement special. Can hold charge while swimming for quick mid-range snipe.
REEF-LUX 450 Deco.weaknesses: Inconsistent damage when it doesn't have time to line up a shot, which is rarely does.
REEF-LUX 450 Deco.playstyle: Plays to paint support. Can hold space with Splash Wall and use Reefslider as a counter offensive trap.
REEF-LUX 450 Deco.recommendation: It's less independent as a slayer, so it needs back up from other frontline weapons or other support weapons.

REEF-LUX 450 MIL-K.strengths: Extreme high paint output with powerful displacement special. Can hold charge while swimming for quick mid-range snipe.
REEF-LUX 450 MIL-K.weaknesses: Inconsistent damage when it doesn't have time to line up a shot, which is rarely does.
REEF-LUX 450 MIL-K.playstyle: Plays to paint support. Gets splats using chip damage from Torpedo. Can defend itself when needed.
REEF-LUX 450 MIL-K.recommendation: It's less independent as a slayer, so it needs back up from other frontline weapons or other support weapons.

Wellstring V.strengths: Powerful area denial with wide shot spread of exploding projectiles. Has a strong one-shot splat for self-defense.
Wellstring V.weaknesses: Relatively short range for its weight class. Slow moving with its main.
Wellstring V.playstyle: Area denial anchor. This kit gives it many more options for damage on offense.
Wellstring V.recommendation: Ultra Stamp gives Wellstring both upclose offense options and a throwable projectile to pick off long range threats it can't otherwise challenge.

Custom Wellstring V.strengths: Powerful area denial with wide shot spread of exploding projectiles. Has a strong one-shot splat for self-defense.
Custom Wellstring V.weaknesses: Relatively short range for its weight class. Slow moving with its main.
Custom Wellstring V.playstyle: Area denial anchor. Uses kit and explosive rounds to make enemy movement difficult.
Custom Wellstring V.recommendation: Kit is intended to mark enemies. Use your vantage point and these tools to point them out to your teammates

Splatana Stamper.strengths: Great combo damage options between its two firing modes and Burst Bomb. Ledge camping option with vertical flick.
Splatana Stamper.weaknesses: Ink hungry, high shot endlag, and requires line-of-sight on opponents that other slayers in this range don't.
Splatana Stamper.playstyle: High-threat midline skirmisher and slayer hybrid. Dynamic power with Zipcaster.
Splatana Stamper.recommendation: This weapon can set the pace of team pushes. Use its threat to draw enemy attention while lower-powered teammates take up space.

Splatana Stamper Nouveau.strengths: Great combo damage options between its two firing modes. Ledge camping option with vertical flick.
Splatana Stamper Nouveau.weaknesses: Poor painting speed and coverage. Kit does little to maximize its offensive power.
Splatana Stamper Nouveau.playstyle: Midline slayer and supportive flex skirmisher.
Splatana Stamper Nouveau.recommendation: This weapon can set the pace of team pushes. Use its threat to draw enemy attention while lower-powered teammates take up space.

Stickerz Splatana Stamper.strengths: Outstanding area denial, rapid special charging speed, and long-range pressure that safely forces heavy anchors to move.
Stickerz Splatana Stamper.weaknesses: Prone to running dry during continuous combat and lacks a fast, low-cost sub-weapon to bail out of trouble.
Stickerz Splatana Stamper.recommendation: This weapon can set the pace of team pushes. Use its threat to draw enemy attention while lower-powered teammates take up space.

Order Splatana Replica.strengths: Great combo damage options between its two firing modes and Burst Bomb. Ledge camping option with vertical flick.
Order Splatana Replica.weaknesses: Ink hungry, high shot endlag, and requires line-of-sight on opponents that other slayers in this range don't.
Order Splatana Replica.playstyle: High-threat midline skirmisher and slayer hybrid. Dynamic power with Zipcaster.
Order Splatana Replica.recommendation: This weapon can set the pace of team pushes. Use its threat to draw enemy attention while lower-powered teammates take up space.

Splatana Wiper.strengths: Extremely high mobility, rapid strafing speed, excellent ink coverage, and low ink usage.
Splatana Wiper.weaknesses: Shorter range than other splatanas and lower raw damage per shot, requiring multiple hits to secure splats from a distance.
Splatana Wiper.playstyle: Highly mobile skirmisher and support hybrid.
Splatana Wiper.recommendation: Leverage your superior strafing speed while slashing. Use Torpedoes to distract or chip targets.

Splatana Wiper Deco.strengths: Extremely high mobility, rapid strafing speed, excellent ink coverage, and low ink usage.
Splatana Wiper Deco.weaknesses: Lack of an offensive throwable sub-weapon limits neutral poking and combo potential.
Splatana Wiper Deco.playstyle: Highly mobile skirmisher and support hybrid.
Splatana Wiper Deco.recommendation: Avoid fighting in linear neutral sightlines where you can be outranged.

Splatana Wiper RUS-T.strengths: Superb mobility and long-range threat combo, enabling sudden entry and explosive pick potential.
Splatana Wiper RUS-T.weaknesses: Short range and weak horizontal slashes leaves it vulnerable in open spaces.
Splatana Wiper RUS-T.playstyle: Highly mobile skirmisher and support hybrid.
Splatana Wiper RUS-T.recommendation: Curling Bomb gives it some poking ability and a way to make quick inroads or escapes.

Mint Decavitator.strengths: Giant horizontal slash hitbox, incredible dash-lunge distance on charged slashes, and excellent self-sustaining survivability.
Mint Decavitator.weaknesses: Slow slash frames make missing shots highly punishable, and horizontal attacks have poor high-ground reach.
Mint Decavitator.playstyle: Self-sustaining frontline slayer and zone holder.
Mint Decavitator.recommendation: Deploy your Big Bubbler directly on objectives or narrow choke points to secure a pocket for your midline weapons. Suction Bombs deny flank routes and herd enemies.

Charcoal Decavitator.strengths: Giant horizontal slash hitbox, incredible dash-lunge distance on charged slashes, and excellent self-sustaining survivability.
Charcoal Decavitator.weaknesses: Very high ink overhead when deploying the wall, and slow recovery frames make self-defense difficult when rushed in the open.
Charcoal Decavitator.playstyle: Aggressive frontline skirmisher and spacing slayer.
Charcoal Decavitator.recommendation: Splash Wall is intended to mitigate slow fire rate. Use it in team fights to create space for you and teammates.
